parameters.name: list_contacts
parameters.description: List recent Salesforce Contacts.

parameters.name: search_contacts
parameters.description: Search Contacts via SOQL WHERE. Default field=Name, operator==, use LIKE with % wildcards.

value.field: ={{ $fromAI('field', "Field to filter on (Name, Email, Phone, Title, ...), default Name", 'string') }}
value.value: ={{ $fromAI('value', "Value to match. Use % wildcards with LIKE (e.g. %@edge.com)", 'string') }}

schema.description: Field to filter on (Name, Email, Phone, Title, ...), default Name
Value to match. Use % wildcards with LIKE (e.g. %@edge.com)

parameters.name: get_contact
parameters.description: Get a Salesforce Contact by Id.

parameters.name: create_contact
parameters.description: Create a Salesforce Contact. LastName required.

parameters.name: update_contact
parameters.description: Update Salesforce Contact by Id.

parameters.name: delete_contact
parameters.description: Delete Salesforce Contact by Id (to Recycle Bin).

parameters.name: list_accounts
parameters.description: List recent Salesforce Accounts (companies).

parameters.name: search_accounts
parameters.description: Search Accounts via SOQL. Default field=Name.

schema.description: Field: Name, Industry, BillingCountry, Website, Phone, ...
Value to match (% wildcards with LIKE)

parameters.name: get_account
parameters.description: Get a Salesforce Account by Id.

parameters.name: create_account
parameters.description: Create Salesforce Account. Name required.

parameters.name: update_account
parameters.description: Update Salesforce Account by Id.

parameters.name: delete_account
parameters.description: Delete Salesforce Account by Id.

parameters.name: list_leads
parameters.description: List recent Salesforce Leads. Unconverted by default.

value.include_converted: ={{ $fromAI('include_converted', "true to include already converted Leads, default false", 'string') }}

schema.description: true to include already converted Leads, default false

parameters.name: search_leads
parameters.description: Search Leads via SOQL. Default field=Name.

value.field: ={{ $fromAI('field', "Field: Name, Company, Email, Status, LeadSource, Rating", 'string') }}

schema.description: Field: Name, Company, Email, Status, LeadSource, Rating

parameters.name: get_lead
parameters.description: Get a Salesforce Lead by Id.

parameters.name: create_lead
parameters.description: Create Salesforce Lead. LastName + Company required.

schema.description: Company name (REQUIRED — Lead must have Company)
Lead status (picklist, e.g. Open - Not Contacted)

parameters.name: update_lead
parameters.description: Update Salesforce Lead by Id.

parameters.name: delete_lead
parameters.description: Delete Salesforce Lead by Id. Note: Lead conversion via REST is edition-dependent — use SF UI Convert button.

parameters.name: list_opportunities
parameters.description: List recent Salesforce Opportunities.

schema.description: true to exclude Closed Won/Lost (default false)

parameters.name: search_opportunities
parameters.description: Search Opportunities via SOQL. Default field=Name.

value.value: ={{ $fromAI('value', "Value to match (unquoted for numeric fields like Amount)", 'string') }}

schema.description: Field: Name, StageName, Amount, CloseDate, OwnerId
Value to match (unquoted for numeric fields like Amount)

parameters.name: get_opportunity
parameters.description: Get a Salesforce Opportunity by Id.

parameters.name: create_opportunity
parameters.description: Create Salesforce Opportunity. Name + StageName + CloseDate required.

value.Name: ={{ $fromAI('Name', "Opportunity name (REQUIRED)", 'string') }}
value.StageName: ={{ $fromAI('StageName', "Stage (REQUIRED, picklist e.g. Prospecting, Qualification, Closed Won)", 'string') }}

schema.description: Stage (REQUIRED, picklist e.g. Prospecting, Qualification, Closed Won)

parameters.name: update_opportunity
parameters.description: Update Salesforce Opportunity by Id.

parameters.name: delete_opportunity
parameters.description: Delete Salesforce Opportunity by Id.

parameters.name: list_cases
parameters.description: List recent Salesforce Cases (Service Cloud).

parameters.name: get_case
parameters.description: Get a Salesforce Case by Id.

parameters.name: create_case
parameters.description: Create Salesforce Case. Subject required.

parameters.name: update_case
parameters.description: Update Salesforce Case by Id.

parameters.name: delete_case
parameters.description: Delete Salesforce Case by Id.

parameters.name: list_tasks
parameters.description: List recent Salesforce Tasks.

parameters.name: create_task
parameters.description: Create Salesforce Task. Subject required.

schema.description: Related Account, Opportunity or Case Id

parameters.name: update_task
parameters.description: Update Salesforce Task by Id.

parameters.name: soql_query
parameters.description: Run a custom SOQL query. Param: query (full SOQL string).

value.query: ={{ $fromAI('query', "Full SOQL string, e.g. SELECT Id, Name FROM Contact WHERE Email LIKE %@edge.com LIMIT 10", 'string') }}

schema.description: Full SOQL string, e.g. SELECT Id, Name FROM Contact WHERE Email LIKE %@edge.com LIMIT 10

parameters.name: sosl_search
parameters.description: Full-text search across multiple SObjects via SOSL.

parameters.name: describe_object
parameters.description: Get schema metadata (fields, types, picklist values) for an SObject.

value.object_type: ={{ $fromAI('object_type', "SObject API name (Contact, Account, Opportunity, Lead, Case, Task, MyObj__c)", 'string') }}

schema.description: SObject API name (Contact, Account, Opportunity, Lead, Case, Task, MyObj__c)
